description: Rewrite 12 fake QuantNeon components from object-tree format to real React JSX with Tailwind CSS. These include ARCamera, ExploreGrid, FilterGallery, InteractiveSticker, MiniGame, PostGrid, ReelPlayer, ShoppingCard, StoryRing, and 3 page components (game/[id].tsx, games.tsx, shop.tsx).
steps: Read apps/quantneon/src/types/index.ts to understand all type definitions (ARFilter, Reel, Post, Game, Story, Product, etc.)
Read apps/quantneon/src/components/ARTryOn.tsx as the gold-standard reference for Tailwind patterns, hook usage, and component structure

Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/components/ARCamera.tsx: Convert object tree to JSX. Props: activeFilter (ARFilter|null), filters (ARFilter[]), isRecording (boolean), facing ('front'|'back'). Include camera viewport, AR overlay, flip/shutter/gallery controls, and filter strip.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/components/ExploreGrid.tsx: Convert to JSX grid layout with explore/discover content.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/components/FilterGallery.tsx: Convert to JSX filter browsing UI.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/components/InteractiveSticker.tsx: Convert to JSX interactive sticker component.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/components/MiniGame.tsx: Convert to JSX mini-game display component.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/components/PostGrid.tsx: Convert to JSX post grid layout.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/components/ReelPlayer.tsx: Convert to full-screen vertical video player JSX with sidebar actions and footer info.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/components/ShoppingCard.tsx: Convert to JSX product/shopping card.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/components/StoryRing.tsx: Convert to JSX story ring/avatar component.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/pages/game/[id].tsx: Convert to JSX game detail page.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/pages/games.tsx: Convert to JSX games hub page with featured carousel and games grid.
Rewrite apps/quantneon/src/pages/shop.tsx: Convert to JSX shopping page.
Verify: Run `pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quantneon` passes with 0 errors.
acceptance_criteria: All 12 QuantNeon files return JSX (not object trees)
grep -n "type: 'div'" across all 12 files returns 0 matches
All files maintain their original Props interfaces
All files use Tailwind CSS classes
All files have proper semantic HTML and ARIA labels
Export structure preserved (named export + default export)
findings: All 12 files rewritten successfully. No type errors in our files. Pre-existing type errors exist in other quantneon files (pages/index.tsx, pages/messages.tsx, hooks/useReels.ts, etc.) but those are unrelated. grep for type: 'div' returns 0 matches across all quantneon tsx files. Full pnpm build passes (84/84 tasks). lint-staged (prettier) ran and reformatted on commit.
